title: The Crew Is Scattered: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Franky, Pacifista, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #2, Nami as the scene develops across pages 14–17.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You're asking me... to trust you...?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: My own position is becoming precarious.

dialogue.text: Just what are you doing... Kuma?
